mapper.select: SELECT GW_ID AS gwId, REQ_ID_CODE AS reqIdCode, ORG_ID AS orgId, TRX_ID AS trxId FROM FWK_LISTENER_TRX_MESSAGE
SELECT SERVICE_ID AS serviceId, SERVICE_SEQ_NO AS serviceSeqNo, COMPONENT_ID AS componentId FROM FWK_SERVICE_RELATION WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId} ORDER BY SERVICE_SEQ_NO ASC

SELECT COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, COMPONENT_CLASS_NAME AS componentClassName, COMPONENT_METHOD_NAME AS componentMethodName, COMPONENT_TYPE AS componentType FROM FWK_COMPONENT WHERE COMPONENT_ID = #{componentId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
